title: No such file in Iceberg write
description:
### Describe the bug
Easy to reproduce.
### How to reproduce
Use the spark.py script to create the table: [spark.py](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/22006565/spark.py)
Then run in ClickHouse:
```sql
CREATE TABLE t0 ENGINE = IcebergLocal(local, path = '/var/lib/clickhouse/user_files/lakehouse/t0/test/t0/');
INSERT INTO TABLE t0 (c0) VALUES (1);
INSERT INTO TABLE t0 (c0) SETTINGS write_full_path_in_iceberg_metadata = 1 VALUES (2);
/*
DB::Exception: std::__1::filesystem::filesystem_error: filesystem error: in last_write_time:
No such file or directory ["/var/lib/clickhouse/user_files/lakehouse/t0/test/t0/a/snap-123789245-2-90ac09d6-a9f4-46f8-b035-45dfcb00f8f8.avro"]. (STD_EXCEPTION)
*/
```
### Error message and/or stacktrace
Stack trace:
```
<Error> TCPHandler: Code: 1001. DB::Exception: std::__1::filesystem::filesystem_error: filesystem error: in last_write_time: No such file or directory ["/var/lib/clickhouse/user_files/lakehouse/t0/test/t0/a/snap-123789245-2-90ac09d6-a9f4-46f8-b035-45dfcb00f8f8.avro"]. (STD_EXCEPTION), Stack trace (when copying this message, always include the lines below):
0. contrib/llvm-project/libcxx/include/__exception/exception.h:113: std::runtime_error::runtime_error(String const&) @ 0x0000000027ec7434
1. contrib/llvm-project/libcxx/src/system_error.cpp:195: std::system_error::system_error(std::error_code, String const&) @ 0x0000000027ecd597
2. contrib/llvm-project/libcxx/include/__filesystem/filesystem_error.h:38: std::filesystem::filesystem_error::filesystem_error[abi:se190107](String const&, std::filesystem::path const&, std::error_code) @ 0x000000001449d51f
3. contrib/llvm-project/libcxx/include/__filesystem/filesystem_error.h:74: void std::filesystem::__throw_filesystem_error[abi:se190107]<String&, std::filesystem::path const&, std::error_code const&>(String&, std::filesystem::path const&, std::error_code const&) @ 0x0000000027e76633
4. contrib/llvm-project/libcxx/src/filesystem/error.h:160: std::filesystem::detail::ErrorHandler<std::chrono::time_point<std::filesystem::_FilesystemClock, std::chrono::duration<__int128, std::ratio<1l, 1000000000l>>>>::report(std::error_code const&) const @ 0x0000000027e7c232
5. contrib/llvm-project/libcxx/src/filesystem/operations.cpp:571: std::filesystem::__last_write_time(std::filesystem::path const&, std::error_code*) @ 0x0000000027e79e87
6. contrib/llvm-project/libcxx/include/__filesystem/operations.h:215: DB::LocalObjectStorage::getObjectMetadata(String const&) const @ 0x0000000019c79833
7. src/Storages/ObjectStorage/StorageObjectStorageSource.cpp:670: DB::createReadBuffer(DB::RelativePathWithMetadata&, std::shared_ptr<DB::IObjectStorage> const&, std::shared_ptr<DB::Context const> const&, std::shared_ptr<Poco::Logger> const&, std::optional<DB::ReadSettings> const&) @ 0x00000000198f7ef5
8. src/Storages/ObjectStorage/DataLakes/Iceberg/IcebergWrites.cpp:657: DB::generateManifestList(DB::FileNamesGenerator const&, Poco::SharedPtr<Poco::JSON::Object, Poco::ReferenceCounter, Poco::ReleasePolicy<Poco::JSON::Object>>, std::shared_ptr<DB::IObjectStorage>, std::shared_ptr<DB::Context const>, std::vector<String, std::allocator<String>> const&, Poco::SharedPtr<Poco::JSON::Object, Poco::ReferenceCounter, Poco::ReleasePolicy<Poco::JSON::Object>>, int, DB::WriteBuffer&, DB::Iceberg::FileContentType, bool) @ 0x0000000019a5e7b5
9. src/Storages/ObjectStorage/DataLakes/Iceberg/IcebergWrites.cpp:1395: DB::IcebergStorageSink::initializeMetadata() @ 0x0000000019a7207c
10. src/Storages/ObjectStorage/DataLakes/Iceberg/IcebergWrites.cpp:1296: DB::IcebergStorageSink::finalizeBuffers() @ 0x0000000019a70ce8
11. src/Storages/ObjectStorage/DataLakes/Iceberg/IcebergWrites.cpp:1268: DB::IcebergStorageSink::onFinish() @ 0x0000000019a70b52
12. contrib/llvm-project/libcxx/include/__functional/function.h:716: ? @ 0x000000001f455e03
13. src/Processors/Transforms/ExceptionKeepingTransform.cpp:172: DB::ExceptionKeepingTransform::work() @ 0x000000001f4559bd
14. src/Processors/Executors/ExecutionThreadContext.cpp:53: DB::ExecutionThreadContext::executeTask() @ 0x000000001f1b59d0
15. src/Processors/Executors/PipelineExecutor.cpp:350: DB::PipelineExecutor::executeStepImpl(unsigned long, DB::IAcquiredSlot*, std::atomic<bool>*) @ 0x000000001f1a8705
16. src/Processors/Executors/PipelineExecutor.cpp:179: DB::PipelineExecutor::executeStep(std::atomic<bool>*) @ 0x000000001f1a7e4e
17. src/Processors/Executors/PushingPipelineExecutor.cpp:131: DB::PushingPipelineExecutor::finish() @ 0x000000001f1c1c5f
18. src/Server/TCPHandler.cpp:1205: DB::TCPHandler::processInsertQuery(DB::QueryState&) @ 0x000000001f0d58b6

20. src/Server/TCPHandler.cpp:2740: DB::TCPHandler::run() @ 0x000000001f0e4424

In the original run, I got a logical error instead:
```
<Fatal> : Logical error: 'std::exception. Code: 1001, type: std::out_of_range, e.what() = basic_string (version 25.9.1.212 (official build)), Stack trace:
0. contrib/llvm-project/libcxx/include/__exception/exception.h:113: std::logic_error::logic_error(char const*) @ 0x0000000027ec72b4
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1 (id INT UNSIGNED, name VARCHAR(255), created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) ENGINE = INNODB;
CREATE TABLE t2 (id INT UNSIGNED, value DOUBLE, description VARCHAR(255) NULL) ENGINE = INNODB;
INSERT INTO t2 (id, value, description) VALUES (2, 3.14, NULL);
INSERT INTO t2 (id, value, description) SELECT id, value * 2, name FROM t1;
key_bug_features: Filesystem error during Iceberg table write operation
